query:
SELECT ce.id, ce.user_id, ce.course_id, c.code, c.title 
FROM course_enrollments ce 
JOIN courses c ON ce.course_id = c.id 
WHERE ce.user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'student@test.com');
